label: The Riftward Canteen
description: The Riftward Canteen occupies a low-vaulted bay of vitrified basalt set into the bastion’s interlocked tiers, its walls plated with scavenged wreck-metal that dulls the ever-present auroral backwash. Shielded light strips burn behind mesh baffles, giving the interior a permanent bruise-hued gloom that matches the nightside glare outside. A long slagcrete bar and bolted bench-ranks define the floorplan, while enclosed vent-stacks and condenser units keep ash and electrostatic grit from the drinking hall. Vox-suppression panels and heavy door seals reduce the city’s constant interference to a muted thrum, turning the space into a rare pocket of controlled quiet.
